sections.paragraph:
f. of the preceding.-

(1) acquisition, possession, Gen 23:18.

(2) purchase, buying, סֵפֶר הַמִּקְנָה the deed of a purchase, Jer 32:11, seq.; also a thing bought; מִקְנַת כֶּסֶף used of slaves bought for money, Gen 17:12, 13 Gen 17:13, 23 Gen 17:23.

(3) price of purchase, purchase money, Levit. 25:16 , 51 Lev 25:51.
